short.en: Two L-shaped feet that lift any 13–16" laptop to eye level when paired with an external keyboard.
short.sl: Dva L-stojala, ki vsak 13–16" prenosnik dvigneta na višino oči pri uporabi z zunanjo tipkovnico.

description.en: Open back and large vent slots keep airflow up to the laptop's intake fans. Rubberised TPU foot pads (multi-material print) prevent sliding. Holds a 2.4 kg ThinkPad without measurable deflection.
description.sl: Odprta zadnja stran in velike prezračevalne reže omogočajo zračni tok do ventilatorjev prenosnika. TPU gumirana stopala (večmaterialni tisk) preprečujejo drsenje. Drži 2,4 kg ThinkPad brez merljivega upogiba.
